heading: Contractor inventories
label: 546 Contractor inventories
text: Subject to regulations of the Administrator of General Services, an executive agency may authorize a contractor or subcontractor with the agency to retain or dispose of contractor inventory.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)54640:484(f)., title II, § 203(f), .June 30, 1949, ch. 28863 Stat. 386
